'''Beau''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighter]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Their callsign was [[Red Ten/Legends|Red Ten]].

==Biography==
In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], they were stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] after suffering minor injuries from a battle to capture new experimental [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] prototypes, and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] brought them [[Veromulan candies]] at the medical bay. They eventually recovered from the injuries and continued active service against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[4 ABY/Legends|A year later]], Beau participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and was killed during the firefight against enemy fighters.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
